query: Generate and validate a vtk.js volume rendering scene with browser evidence vtk.js Volume Baseline Keep the volume task deterministic while making transfer-function intent explicit for later upgrades.
recommendedPatterns: Expect screenshot, console log, page error log, and a structured render verdict.
Treat browser evidence as the acceptance contract for vtk.js scene validation.
Inject the vtk.js browser bundle before any module script that references global vtk.
Use slice, volume, streamline, and mag-iso as the benchmark backbone for vtk.js eval.
Retrieve mapper plus transfer-function setup before generating volume scenes.
Seed streamline scenes explicitly and confirm vector-field inputs before validation.
failureFixPairs: If artifacts are missing, rerun the canonical Docker workflow instead of improvising a different browser command.
When the page says vtk is not defined, restore the runtime script include before changing scene logic.
Capture artifact expectations per benchmark case so later eval output stays comparable.
If volume output is blank, verify transfer-function and camera-reset steps before deeper repair.
If streamline output is empty, inspect seed generation and pipeline ordering before general browser repair.
If validation fails early, retry with the minimal full-screen bootstrap scene first.
generationPrompt: Generate vtk.js code for the requested scene while preserving a deterministic browser-validation path. Scene kind: volume. Use these retrieval-backed patterns: Expect screenshot, console log, page error log, and a structured render verdict. | Treat browser evidence as the acceptance contract for vtk.js scene validation. | Inject the vtk.js browser bundle before any module script that references global vtk. | Use slice, volume, streamline, and mag-iso as the benchmark backbone for vtk.js eval. | Retrieve mapper plus transfer-function setup before generating volume scenes. | Seed streamline scenes explicitly and confirm vector-field inputs before validation.. Avoid regressions captured by these failure-fix hints: If artifacts are missing, rerun the canonical Docker workflow instead of improvising a different browser command. | When the page says vtk is not defined, restore the runtime script include before changing scene logic. | Capture artifact expectations per benchmark case so later eval output stays comparable. | If volume output is blank, verify transfer-function and camera-reset steps before deeper repair. | If streamline output is empty, inspect seed generation and pipeline ordering before general browser repair. | If validation fails early, retry with the minimal full-screen bootstrap scene first.. Acceptance contract: The scene should create a visible canvas during browser verification. | The script should end with renderer.resetCamera() followed by renderWindow.render(). | Browser evidence should include render-verification.json, browser-console.json, page-errors.json, and render-screenshot.png. | The browser console and page error logs should stay free of runtime errors. | The generated volume workflow should make mapper plus transfer-function setup explicit..
acceptanceChecks: The scene should create a visible canvas during browser verification.
The script should end with renderer.resetCamera() followed by renderWindow.render().
Browser evidence should include render-verification.json, browser-console.json, page-errors.json, and render-screenshot.png.
The browser console and page error logs should stay free of runtime errors.
The generated volume workflow should make mapper plus transfer-function setup explicit.
